== Notes for [[Item:Q110731|Q110731]] ==

59. ALWI-MUHAMMAD-14 .
died in 512h-Bayt Jubair, Yemen.
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d14.htm#i12
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0012.html

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
